name: convex
description: Bundled design + quickstart skills, code-writing and code-review subagents, lint guard + end-of-turn verify hooks, runtime-error and OCC-insights monitors, and MCP server for live deployment introspection. The quickstart scaffolds a running app from one sentence and builds it live LOCALLY, narrated in chat; the convex-reviewer subagent audits Convex functions for auth, validators, and performance. Build reactive, type-safe backends on one platform — schema, real-time, file storage, scheduled jobs, and AI agents.
